name: Taylor Christianson
title: Lead Programmer
bio: Lead Programmer and natural team lead with professional experience at Halfbrick Studios.
Joined as a Graduate Programmer and promoted to Lead within 6 months.
I consistently take on leadership roles across every project I work on - pitching ideas, building prototypes, and driving teams from concept through production.
As team lead I managed a team of 4, conducting quarterly and annual performance reviews and mentorship alongside my technical responsibilities.
My core expertise is Unity and C#, with generalist experience spanning systems architecture, AI behaviors, game design, mobile optimization, and tool development.
